debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
i : Fin d
μ : Fin d → Measure ℝ
inst✝ : ∀ (i : Fin d), IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i)
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Integrable f (μ i)
⊢ ∫ (a : Fin d → ℝ), f (a i) ∂Measure.pi μ = ∫ (x : ℝ), f x ∂μ i

proof:
have hm : Measurable (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) := measurable_pi_apply i
  have hmap : (Measure.pi μ).map (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) = μ i := by
    ext s hs
    rw [Measure.map_apply hm hs]
    have heq : (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) ⁻¹' s = Set.pi Set.univ (fun j => if j = i then s else Set.univ) := by
      ext a
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies]
      constructor
      · intro ha j; by_cases hj : j = i <;> simp [hj, ha]
      · intro ha; simpa using ha i
    simp only [heq, Measure.pi_pi]
    rw [Finset.prod_eq_single i]
    · simp
    · intro j _ hji; simp [hji]
    · simp
  rw [← integral_map hm.aemeasurable (hmap ▸ hf.aestronglyMeasurable), hmap]
successful_attempts:
have hm : Measurable (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) := measurable_pi_apply i
  have hmap : (Measure.pi μ).map (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) = μ i := by
    ext s hs
    rw [Measure.map_apply hm hs]
    have heq : (fun a : Fin d → ℝ => a i) ⁻¹' s = Set.pi Set.univ (fun j => if j = i then s else Set.univ) := by
      ext a
      simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ, true_implies]
      constructor
      · intro ha j; by_cases hj : j = i <;> simp [hj, ha]
      · intro ha; simpa using ha i
    simp only [heq, Measure.pi_pi]
    rw [Finset.prod_eq_single i]
    · simp
    · intro j _ hji; simp [hji]
    · simp
  rw [← integral_map hm.aemeasurable (hmap ▸ hf.aestronglyMeasurable), hmap]
